title: Khaitan & Co advises Reliance on Meta AI data centre setup in Gujarat
description: Reliance Industries Limited (RIL) has partnered with Meta for the setup of an artificial intelligence (AI) data centre in Jamnagar, Gujarat.Under the agreement, Reliance will build a 168-megawatt data centre, which Meta will lease for its AI and computing requirements.Khaitan & Co advised Reliance Industries on the transaction. The transaction team was led by Partners Atman Desai, Mudit Shah and Divya Chaturvedi.Atman Desai, Mudit Shah and Divya ChaturvediThe team also included Hetashri Khaj
